meta.sourcePolicy: Official HPA/JPA sources only. This file records 2019 event-level source candidates and must not auto-promote athlete histories into data/database.json.
notes: Temporary 2019 official-source candidate addendum for HPA Event Watch.
Keep separate from athlete master data, confirmed athlete histories, and research candidates.
The linked annual HPA result PDF is an event-level source locator; individual athlete rows require separate identity and row verification before promotion.
2019 source pages are historical official result PDFs; program, outline, entry roster, schedule, live速報, and YouTube links were not promoted unless separately confirmed.

events.name: 国民体育大会パワーリフティング公開競技 第5回北海道代表選考会

sources.evidenceLines: PDF pages for 国民体育大会パワーリフティング公開競技 第5回北海道代表選考会 state 2019年5月12日 and 会場 江別市民体育館. The header also references いきいき茨城ゆめ国体・北海道代表.

promotionGuardrails: Use this entry only as an official event source locator.
Do not create athlete histories from this file without row-level verification.
National-sport selection labels and ordinary Hokkaido championship labels must remain distinct in future importers.
Do not infer athlete progression comments from this addendum alone.
